LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF SANTA CLARA COUNTY'S MOTION TO DISMISS THE ACTION IS GRANTED AS TO SANTA CLARA COUNTY. PLAINTIFF'S OPPOSITION FAILS TO DEMONSTRATE THAT THERE IS ANY BASIS FOR ESTABLISHING A QUI TAM ACTION AGAINST DEFENDANTS. THERE IS NO CREDIBLE EVIDENCE OF ACTUAL KNOWLEDGE OR RECKLESS INDIFFERENCE WITH RESPECT TO DEFENDANTS SEEKING AND OBTAINING A LICENSE. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600.
